name: Nikola Corporation
description: Nikola Corporation is an American technology company that designs and manufactures heavy-duty commercial battery-electric and hydrogen fuel-cell electric vehicles. Headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona, the company focuses on developing zero-emission transportation solutions, including electric vehicle drivetrains, energy storage systems, and hydrogen fueling station infrastructure. Nikola aims to decarbonize the trucking industry by providing integrated fleet solutions, such as its Class 8 trucks, designed to offer sustainable and efficient alternatives to traditional diesel-powered commercial vehicles for long-haul transport and logistics operations.
